creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
Created attachment 157974
shar with new port devel/rubygem-devise-async-rails4

While working at a port for gitlab, i figured out, that this port is needed to support the creation of an packet for gitlab. The port devel/rubygem-devise-async exists, but just which the default option to use rubygem-devise, which needs rubygem-railties in version 3. gitlab needs version 4, so there will be a conflict by using the existing port.
